name: ui-skills
description: Reverse-engineer any live website into production-ready React + Tailwind code. Reads actual computed CSS, DOM structure, JS interactions, and animations — not just a screenshot. Downloads ALL loaded JS chunks (lazy chunks via performance API, not just main bundle) and produces transition-spec.json + bundle-map.json as single source of truth for implementation. Prior analysis is loaded automatically on re-invocation. Step execution rules organized by phase (Before → Extraction → Implementation → Verification). Verifies output with AE/SSIM pixel diff + scoring loop + DOM clip screenshot pixel diff + VLM sanity check. Includes sub-skills for animation extraction (WAAPI, canvas/WebGL, scroll-driven JS), visual baseline capture, and overlay-based analysis report.
